text:
Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
26

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS

W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
Mars u Survival, courage, daring, ability to fight, ascent, competition,
action, energy, vitality, anger, driving force, fighting spirit
KEY WORDS POSITIVE NEGATIVE MUNDANE
ACTION Assertive Threatening War by oppression, Riots,
DARING Energetic Aggressive rebellion, Assertive
COURAGE
Sporting Fighting Pioneering, Competitive
DRIVE
Enthusiastic Pass-work to Epidemics, infestation
IMPATIENCE
WILL, FIGHTER, Focussed fight Murderers and traitors
ANGER Competitive Frustrated Working class, barbers,
CREATIVE Courageous Hot-headed butchers, arms manufacturer

Heroic impatient Slaughterhouse
SEXUALITY
Survive Surgeries, operation theatres,
IMMENSE LIFE
FORCE, BLOOD, Endure armament factory, military
